subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that thou art in the utmost degree of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه شما رسید و از مضامین معلوم گردید که در نهایت درجه حب و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
